title: Huntington Bancshares Investor Relations Overview
note: Primary investor-relations overview for company scale, assets, revenue snapshot, and current company positioning.

title: Huntington Bancshares Incorporated Reports 2026 First-Quarter Earnings
note: Recent earnings release with net income, profitability ratios, acquisition integration status, loan and deposit growth, branch footprint, and business description.

title: Annual Reports and Proxy Statements
note: Company annual-report page linking to the 2025 Annual Report used as a durable filing reference for the refresh.

title: Open a Checking Account Online in Minutes
note: Official consumer checking page documenting Huntington checking tiers, digital tools, mobile banking, fees, alerts, and account features.

title: Commercial Banking Solutions
note: Official commercial banking page documenting deposits, liquidity management, receivables, payables, capital markets, credit, leasing, private banking, online services, and advisory capabilities.

title: Huntington Bancshares Market Capitalization
note: Market-cap source used for the registry market-cap input metric and public market-data context.

title: Huntington Bancshares P/E Ratio
note: Market-data source used for Huntington's trailing P/E ratio input metric.

title: Fedimint
note: Open-source federated e-cash project used as the primary decentralized checking and community custody alternative.

title: How Fedimint Works
note: Explains Fedimint community custody, e-cash notes, private transfers, guardian visibility, and Lightning interoperability.

title: Fedimint Technical Reference
note: Technical documentation for Fedimint modules, federation architecture, e-cash, wallet, Lightning integration, and threshold cryptography.

title: Apache Fineract
note: Open-source core banking platform used as an alternative and enabler for cooperative checking and commercial treasury concepts.

title: GNU Taler Home
note: Project source for GNU Taler's privacy-friendly online payment positioning and wallet resources.

title: GNU Taler Documentation
note: Technical documentation for Taler merchant, exchange, wallet, bank integration, auditor, and operator components.

title: Open Bank Project
note: Open-source open-banking API platform used as an enabler for portable account visibility, payment APIs, and cooperative treasury concepts.

title: BTCPay Server
note: Self-hosted open-source Bitcoin payment processor used as a merchant payment and commercial receivables alternative.

title: BTCPay Server Documentation
note: Documents BTCPay Server as free, open-source, self-hosted Bitcoin payment gateway software with invoices, refunds, peer-to-peer payments, and Lightning support.
